about.title: What is Suma Digital and how does it change your everyday life?
about.p1: Suma Digital was born so you can stop worrying about where your money went at the end of the month. Think of it as a personal secretary that lives in your WhatsApp. You don't need to learn complicated software or write in notebooks that get lost.
about.p2: It works like this: every time you buy something or pay for a service, you simply send a voice message or a text to our system, as if you were telling a friend. We take care of organizing that information and showing it to you on a clear screen that tells you, in real time, how much you're spending and how much you've managed to save for your dreams.
about.p3: We use the most advanced technology in the world to ensure that managing your finances is real, secure and, above all, very easy. We want you to regain the peace of mind of knowing exactly where you stand, so that your only job is watching your savings grow month after month.

landing.badge: Your AI-powered financial assistant on WhatsApp 📱
landing.featuresTitle: Tracking expenses has never been easier
landing.featuresSubtitle: Your financial assistant is a WhatsApp message away. Forget spreadsheets; send a voice note while walking or snap a receipt, and Suma automates your finances instantly.
landing.feat1Desc: Write "Spent $50 at the store" and Suma does the rest. No weird commands.
landing.feat2Desc: On the go? Send a voice message. AI transcribes it and extracts the expense automatically.
landing.feat3Desc: Take a photo of your receipt. Suma reads the image and logs the amount for you.
landing.feat4Desc: Analyzes context and labels it as "Food", "Transport" or "Services".
landing.feat5Desc: Log in and view your monthly and daily summaries in clean, intuitive charts.
landing.feat6Desc: Your data is protected in the cloud. Only you have access to your financial information.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start managing your expenses today, for free. We'll add premium plans for advanced analytics soon.
landing.bizDesc: If you handle a high volume of transactions, we're your solution. We can connect Suma directly to your database or admin software (ERP).
landing.bizFeat3: Multiple employees/users on the same account
landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about how Suma handles your money and your data.
landing.faq1q: Why is Suma the ultimate tool for my savings?
landing.faq1a: Unlike a manual spreadsheet that requires constant time and discipline, Suma turns your WhatsApp into an intelligent financial assistant. It's as simple as sending a message, voice note, or photo to take real control of your expenses.
landing.faq2q: Does Suma read my other WhatsApp chats?
landing.faq2a: Absolutely not. Suma works like just another contact. It only has access to messages, photos, or audio you send directly to its number. Your privacy is absolute.
landing.faq3q: What happens if I make a mistake logging an expense?
landing.faq3a: No problem! You can write to Suma saying "Delete the last expense" or "I made a mistake, the store was $150, not $15". The AI understands context and corrects it.
landing.faq4a: We use advanced artificial intelligence. When you send a photo of a receipt, the AI extracts the total amount, date, and store automatically, without you having to type a single number.

timeline.sectionSubtitle: Discover how we transform your relationship with money in 3 simple steps.
timeline.t1Body: Manage all your finances from the chat you already use every day, without downloading apps or filling out long forms. Just send a text message, a voice note, or a photo of a receipt and the system handles the rest. It's the most efficient way to maintain total control of your money in seconds.
timeline.t2Body: Our technology processes your messages to organize expenses and income automatically. The system distinguishes on its own whether you're making a payment or setting money aside to save. When you send a photo of a receipt, the AI detects the key data so you never miss a detail.
timeline.t3Body: Access a professional panel from your computer or phone to see the real state of your accounts with total clarity. View your monthly spending through simple charts and track your savings goals in detail. It's the ultimate tool for understanding where your money goes and making confident decisions about your financial future.
